description: Energy Services of America Corporation operates as a contractor and service company for the natural gas, petroleum, water distribution, automotive, chemical, and power industries in the United States. The company constructs, replaces, and repairs interstate and intrastate natural gas pipelines and storage facilities for utility companies and private natural gas companies; and provides services relating to pipeline, storage facilities, and plant works. It also offers electrical and mechanical installation, and repair services, including substation and switchyard, site preparation, equipment set
